description: Style Note This manually treated denim with a lightly washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from spykar, while the blended fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. The stretchy quality of these jeans gives an excellent Fit as well. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers. Product Details Blue washed jeans with a slightly crumpled look around the pockets, has a mid height waist, belt loops around the waist, buttoned and zippered closure, brand patch on the waistband at the back, two insert pockets in front with a patch coin pocket inside the right pocket, two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail and a slight distressed look at the hem Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% spandex Wash and dry separately Wash inside out using a mild detergent Do not bleach and dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit, mid waist The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
